goal: Prove every feature standalone against real data per docs/standalone_proof_plan.md; Claude plans+gates+commits, codex gpt-5.5 codes one atomic step per invocation. — COMPLETE 2026-07-08: all 11 harnesses closed with parity legs green vs real Jetson data. Armed sentinels: R15 (named person), thumb-fetch log regeneration.
north_star: GROUND-TRUTH PARITY (Israel, 2026-07-08): standalones must be IDENTICAL to live — given raw Jetson captures, the harness (real modules, real fixtures) must reproduce the exact results the Jetson produced, verified by diffing against Jetson logs/db/artifacts. Every harness ends with a PARITY leg (see plan doc STANDING RULE); contract pins alone never close a harness; missing Jetson-side ground truth means adding observability + refetching, not skipping. Every codex prompt carries this; every gate enforces it.
parallelism_rule: STANDING (Israel, 2026-07-08): run at MAX parallelism constantly without losing quality — every disjoint-directory codex lane filled (server harness dirs, detection harness dirs, client e2e vs client src are all separate lanes; read-only spec rounds are free); the gate stays serial and strict (run suite, review diff, reject dishonest tests, atomic commits); convert every landed spec into an implementation lane immediately; prefetch long poles (deps, builds, fixtures) the moment they're foreseeable.
resume_contract: On wake: 0) re-read north_star AND parallelism_rule — reject any drift from ground-truth parity even if tests are green; keep all lanes full; 1) read this file + docs/standalone_proof_plan.md checklists; 2) `git log --oneline -15` to see what landed; 3) run the harness suites to confirm green; 4) for any in_flight codex step: check the tree for its files — if present and green, gate+commit+tick checklist; if absent, re-issue that step verbatim; 5) issue the next unchecked step (one per codex invocation, workspace-write); 6) update this file; 7) do NOT ask the user anything — only write a blocked entry on a genuinely unrecoverable blocker. Parallel lanes allowed across DISJOINT harness dirs only. Fixtures live under .jetson-snapshot/proof_fixtures/ (gitignored; push/ contains SECRETS, never commit or log bytes). Capture new Jetson fixtures opportunistically when it is reachable.
codex_invocation: ALWAYS via the stall guard (skill codex-stall-guard): .claude/scripts/codex-guard.sh <logfile> codex exec --sandbox workspace-write --model gpt-5.5 -C <repo> "ATOMIC STEP <id> ONLY of harness #<n> (spec: <specdoc>; checklist: docs/standalone_proof_plan.md)... NOTHING ELSE... run pytest until green; print tail; no git commit." — never pipe codex stdout through tail (blinds liveness); read the logfile tail afterwards.
